title: Core Elements of Antibiotic Stewardship for Nursing Homes | Antibiotic Prescribing and Use | CDC
text:
nload 
Implementation resources 
Leadership commitment 
Demonstrate support and commitment to safe and appropriate antibiotic use in your facility.
Creating a Culture to Improve Antibiotic Use in Nursing Homes 
Stewardship Leadership Commitment Letter for Nursing Homes 
Accountability 
Identify physician, nursing and pharmacy leads responsible for promoting and overseeing antibiotic stewardship activities in your facility.
Leading Antibiotic Stewardship in Nursing Homes 
Drug expertise 
Establish access to consultant pharmacists or other individuals with experience or training in antibiotic stewardship for your facility.
5 Ways Consultant Pharmacists Can Be Antibiotics Aware 
Action 
Implement at least one policy or practice to improve antibiotic use in your facility.
Appendix A: Policy and Practice Actions to Improve Antibiotic Use 
Toolkit to Improve Antibiotic Use in Long-Term Care | Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality 
Stewardship Commitment Poster for Nursing Homes 
Minnesota Antimicrobial Stewardship Program Resources for Long-term Care Facilities | Minnesota Department of Health 
For Nursing Homes | Rochester Patient Safety Collaborative | University of Rochester 
Antimicrobial Stewardship in Long-Term Care Facilities | Colorado Department of Public Health and Environment 
Tracking 
Monitor at least one process measure of antibiotic use and at least one outcome fr
